content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Forsworn Pillager: Your thane’s a damn traitor, consorting with vampires and Imperial dogs! Skyrim belongs to the Forsworn, and we’ll skin you alive before winter’s end. Lydia: Shut your filthy Reachman mouth! Thane MJR could gut you like a fish before you even raised that dull dagger. And Serana may be a liberal bloodsucker, but at least she’s got a tighter cunt than your sister—oh wait, you lot fuck goats, don’t you? Forsworn Pillager: Hah! Your precious Dragonborn rides a vampire whore by night while you polish his boots like a trained skeever. Mark my words, Nord bitch—your temples will burn, and Dibella’s mirrors will show your bruised corpse by dawn. Lydia: Try it, you swamp-slut! I’ll mount head on Whiterun’s gates after MJR puts an arrow through your eye. And tell your goat-fucking kin the next sacrifice they toss into that cave better be lubed—Draugr dicks don’t care if you scream.
Please wrap up the current topic between the NPCs in a natural way. Nobody is leaving, so there is no need for formal goodbyes.
Forsworn Pillager: Enough bark, shield-sister. Your thane’s arrows speak for him. May Dibella claim you when the Reach takes its vengeance. Lydia: Tch. Keep dreaming, cave-shaver.
